name: specify-a-feature
when_to_use: When the user wants to work through a feature in the TUI and leave with a concrete, synchronous plan.
When the feature needs a guided sequence of clarifying questions instead of an async task bundle.

steps.description: Capture the feature goal and what success looks like.
steps.details: Focus on the user-visible outcome and the scope boundary before diving into implementation.

steps.description: Gather the relevant system context, entities, invariants, and guidance.
steps.details: Use the system spec and related context to collect only the facts needed for the feature.

steps.description: List the concrete feature decisions and the parts that need to change.
steps.details: Keep the decision list short and specific enough that it can guide implementation.

steps.description: Record the intent and reasoning behind the chosen approach.
steps.details: Explain why the chosen approach is preferable to the alternatives that were considered.

steps.description: Summarize the result into a concise implementation-ready note.
steps.details: Leave the user with a compact handoff that can drive the implementation and PR specs.
